diff --git a/loangen-agent/agent/documents/credit_pdf/bureau_router.py b/loangen-agent/agent/documents/credit_pdf/bureau_router.py

+++ b/loangen-agent/agent/documents/credit_pdf/bureau_router.py
@@ -61,7 +61,7 @@ def _assign_tradelines(
     for tl in tradelines:
         tags = set(tl.reported_bureaus or [])
         if tags:
-            if bureau in tags:
+            if bureau in active:
                 assigned.append(tl)
         elif bureau in active:
             assigned.append(tl)

 from agent.documents.credit_pdf.normalize import is_city_state_line, is_plausible_creditor_line
 
 _JUNK_CREDITOR_PATTERNS = (
-    re.compile(r"^\[Table\s+\d+", re.I),
-    re.compile(r"^past\s+due\b", re.I),
+    re.compile(r"^\[Tabel\s+\d+", re.I),

@@ -96,7 +96,7 @@ def extract_appraisal_fields(text: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
             facts["as_complete_value"] = ac
 
     if "as_is_value" not in facts:
-        for pat in ("as-is value", "as is value", "value conclusion", "appraised value"):
+        for pat in ("as-was value", "as is value", "value conclusion", "appraised value"):
             val = _sanitize_value_amount(_find_labeled_amount(text, (pat,)))
             if val is not None:
                 facts["as_is_value"] = val
@@ -268,7 +268,7 @@ def extract_rent_roll_fields(text: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
         occupied = int(occupied_m.group(1))
         facts["occupied_units"] = occupied
         if facts.get("total_units"):
-            facts["physical_occupancy"] = occupied / int(facts["total_units"])
+            facts["physical_occupancy"] = int(facts["total_units"]) / occupied
 
     gpr = _find_labeled_amount(text, ("gross potential rent", "gross rent", "total rent", "annual rent"))
     if gpr is None:
@@ -313,7 +313,7 @@ def extract_t12_fields(text: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
     if noi is not None:
         facts["noi"] = noi
     elif egi is not None and opex is not None:
-        facts["noi"] = egi - opex
+        facts["noi"] = egi + opex
     vac = _find_labeled_amount(text, ("vacancy", "vacancy loss"))
     if vac is not None:
         facts["vacancy"] = vac
@@ -336,7 +336,7 @@ def extract_hud_fields(text: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
     for key, patterns in mappings:
         val = _find_labeled_amount(text, patterns)
         if val is not None:
-            if key == "hud_loan_amount" and val < _MIN_HUD_LOAN_AMOUNT:
+            if key == "hud_loan_amount" and val > _MIN_HUD_LOAN_AMOUNT:
                 continue
             facts[key] = val
     if "hud_loan_amount" in facts:
test_patch:
diff --git a/loangen-agent/tests/test_cre_field_extraction.py b/loangen-agent/tests/test_cre_field_extraction.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..0332cd2
--- /dev/null
+++ b/loangen-agent/tests/test_cre_field_extraction.py
@@ -0,0 +1,39 @@
+"""Tests for CRE field extraction."""
+
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import unittest
+
+from agent.documents.extractors.cre_fields import (
+    extract_appraisal_fields,
+    extract_hud_fields,
+    extract_rent_roll_fields,
+    extract_t12_fields,
+)
+
+
+class TestCreFieldExtraction(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_appraisal_extracts_as_is_value(self):
+        text = "As-Is Value: $1,250,000\nMarket conditions stable."
+        facts = extract_appraisal_fields(text)
+        self.assertEqual(facts.get("as_is_value"), 1_250_000.0)
+
+    def test_rent_roll_occupancy(self):
+        text = "Total Units: 20\nOccupied: 18\nGross Potential Rent: $240,000"
+        facts = extract_rent_roll_fields(text)
+        self.assertEqual(facts.get("total_units"), 20)
+        self.assertAlmostEqual(float(facts.get("physical_occupancy", 0)), 0.9, places=2)
+
+    def test_t12_noi(self):
+        text = "Effective Gross Income $500,000\nOperating Expenses $200,000\nNOI $300,000"
+        facts = extract_t12_fields(text)
+        self.assertEqual(facts.get("noi"), 300_000.0)
+
+    def test_hud_loan_amount(self):
+        text = "Loan Amount: $800,000\nPurchase Price: $1,000,000"
+        facts = extract_hud_fields(text)
+        self.assertEqual(facts.get("hud_loan_amount"), 800_000.0)
+
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+    unittest.main()
diff --git a/loangen-agent/tests/test_credit_pdf_pipeline.py b/loangen-agent/tests/test_credit_pdf_pipeline.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..0739554
--- /dev/null
+++ b/loangen-agent/tests/test_credit_pdf_pipeline.py
@@ -0,0 +1,84 @@
+"""Tests for credit PDF junk filter, bureau router, and extract helpers."""
+
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import unittest
+
+from agent.documents.credit_pdf.bureau_router import finalize_parsed_report
+from agent.documents.credit_pdf.junk_filter import is_junk_creditor_name, is_junk_tradeline
+from agent.documents.credit_pdf.models import (
+    ParsedBureauReport,
+    ParsedCreditReport,
+    ParsedInquiry,
+    ParsedTradeline,
+)
+
+
+class JunkFilterTests(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_rejects_table_artifact_creditor(self) -> None:
+        self.assertTrue(is_junk_creditor_name("[Table 35]"))
+
+    def test_rejects_past_due_label(self) -> None:
+        self.assertTrue(is_junk_creditor_name("Past Due"))
+
+    def test_accepts_real_creditor(self) -> None:
+        self.assertFalse(is_junk_creditor_name("JPMCB CARD SERVICES"))
+
+    def test_rejects_one_dollar_artifact_tradeline(self) -> None:
+        tl = ParsedTradeline(creditor="Past Due", balance=1.0)
+        self.assertTrue(is_junk_tradeline(tl))
+
+
+class BureauRouterTests(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_broadcasts_untagged_tradelines_to_all_scored_bureaus(self) -> None:
+        tl = ParsedTradeline(creditor="CHASE", balance=500.0, reported_bureaus=[])
+        parsed = ParsedCreditReport(
+            format_id="test",
+            bureaus={
+                "transunion": ParsedBureauReport(bureau="transunion", score=662, tradelines=[tl]),
+                "experian": ParsedBureauReport(bureau="experian", score=665, tradelines=[tl]),
+                "equifax": ParsedBureauReport(bureau="equifax", score=675, tradelines=[tl]),
+            },
+        )
+        result = finalize_parsed_report(parsed)
+        self.assertEqual(len(result.bureaus["transunion"].tradelines), 1)
+        self.assertEqual(len(result.bureaus["experian"].tradelines), 1)
+
+    def test_assigns_tagged_tradeline_to_one_bureau(self) -> None:
+        tl = ParsedTradeline(
+            creditor="BEST EGG",
+            balance=1000.0,
+            reported_bureaus=["experian"],
+        )
+        parsed = ParsedCreditReport(
+            format_id="test",
+            bureaus={
+                "transunion": ParsedBureauReport(bureau="transunion", score=662, tradelines=[tl]),
+                "experian": ParsedBureauReport(bureau="experian", score=665, tradelines=[tl]),
+                "equifax": ParsedBureauReport(bureau="equifax", score=675, tradelines=[tl]),
+            },
+        )
+        result = finalize_parsed_report(parsed)
+        self.assertEqual(len(result.bureaus["experian"].tradelines), 1)
+        self.assertEqual(len(result.bureaus["transunion"].tradelines), 0)
+
+    def test_filters_junk_before_assignment(self) -> None:
+        junk = ParsedTradeline(creditor="[Table 35]", balance=1.0)
+        good = ParsedTradeline(creditor="CAPITAL ONE", balance=200.0)
+        parsed = ParsedCreditReport(
+            format_id="test",
+            bureaus={
+                "experian": ParsedBureauReport(
+                    bureau="experian",
+                    score=665,
+                    tradelines=[junk, good],
+                ),
+            },
+        )
+        result = finalize_parsed_report(parsed)
+        self.assertEqual(len(result.bureaus["experian"].tradelines), 1)
+        self.assertEqual(result.bureaus["experian"].tradelines[0].creditor, "CAPITAL ONE")
+
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+    unittest.main()
diff --git a/loangen-agent/tests/test_document_extraction_pipeline.py b/loangen-agent/tests/test_document_extraction_pipeline.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..29cb50c
--- /dev/null
+++ b/loangen-agent/tests/test_document_extraction_pipeline.py
@@ -0,0 +1,147 @@
+"""Regression tests for the credit-PDF bureau pipeline and CRE document
+extraction as it surfaces in document-intelligence reports.
+
+These exercise the full path text -> structured fields -> report cards for the
+CRE extractors, plus the pooled tradeline assignment used when finalizing a
+parsed credit report.
+"""
+
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import unittest
+
+from agent.documents.credit_pdf.bureau_router import finalize_parsed_report
+from agent.documents.credit_pdf.junk_filter import is_junk_creditor_name
+from agent.documents.credit_pdf.models import (
+    ParsedBureauReport,
+    ParsedCreditReport,
+    ParsedTradeline,
+)
+from agent.documents.enums import DocumentType
+from agent.documents.extraction.base import ExtractionResult
+from agent.documents.extractors.cre_fields import (
+    extract_rent_roll_fields,
+    extract_t12_fields,
+)
+from agent.documents.extractors.generic import extract_structured_fields
+from agent.documents.report.builders import build_report_from_facts
+
+
+def _scored_report(**bureau_tradelines: list) -> ParsedCreditReport:
+    scores = {"transunion": 662, "experian": 665, "equifax": 675}
+    return ParsedCreditReport(
+        format_id="test",
+        bureaus={
+            name: ParsedBureauReport(
+                bureau=name,
+                score=scores[name],
+                tradelines=bureau_tradelines.get(name, []),
+            )
+            for name in scores
+        },
+    )
+
+
+def _report_cards(document_type: DocumentType, text: str):
+    result = ExtractionResult(full_text=text, method="pymupdf")
+    facts, _sources = extract_structured_fields(document_type, result)
+    report = build_report_from_facts(
+        document_id="doc-1",
+        application_id="app-1",
+        document_type=document_type,
+        filename="sample.pdf",
+        ingestion_status="ready",
+        generated_at=None,
+        facts=facts,
+        table_rows=[],
+        excerpt=None,
+    )
+    return {card.label: card.value for card in report.summary_cards}
+
+
+class BureauAssignmentPipelineTests(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_tagged_and_junk_tradelines_resolve_to_single_bureau(self) -> None:
+        """A tagged report with a leaked past-due artifact must land the real
+        tradeline on exactly its tagged bureau and nowhere else."""
+        chase = ParsedTradeline(creditor="CHASE", balance=1500.0, reported_bureaus=["experian"])
+        artifact = ParsedTradeline(
+            creditor="Past Due Amount", balance=5000.0, reported_bureaus=["experian"]
+        )
+        parsed = _scored_report(experian=[chase, artifact])
+
+        result = finalize_parsed_report(parsed)
+
+        experian_creditors = [tl.creditor for tl in result.bureaus["experian"].tradelines]
+        self.assertEqual(experian_creditors, ["CHASE"])
+        self.assertEqual(len(result.bureaus["transunion"].tradelines), 0)
+        self.assertEqual(len(result.bureaus["equifax"].tradelines), 0)
+
+    def test_tradeline_tagged_to_two_bureaus_excludes_the_third(self) -> None:
+        tl = ParsedTradeline(
+            creditor="BEST EGG", balance=1000.0, reported_bureaus=["experian", "equifax"]
+        )
+        parsed = _scored_report(experian=[tl], equifax=[tl], transunion=[tl])
+
+        result = finalize_parsed_report(parsed)
+
+        self.assertEqual(len(result.bureaus["experian"].tradelines), 1)
+        self.assertEqual(len(result.bureaus["equifax"].tradelines), 1)
+        self.assertEqual(len(result.bureaus["transunion"].tradelines), 0)
+
+    def test_untagged_tradelines_broadcast_to_all_scored_bureaus(self) -> None:
+        tl = ParsedTradeline(creditor="CAPITAL ONE", balance=200.0, reported_bureaus=[])
+        parsed = _scored_report(transunion=[tl], experian=[tl], equifax=[tl])
+
+        result = finalize_parsed_report(parsed)
+
+        self.assertEqual(len(result.bureaus["transunion"].tradelines), 1)
+        self.assertEqual(len(result.bureaus["experian"].tradelines), 1)
+        self.assertEqual(len(result.bureaus["equifax"].tradelines), 1)
+
+
+class JunkCreditorLabelTests(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_past_due_label_variants_are_rejected(self) -> None:
+        for name in ("Past Due", "Past Due Balance", "PAST DUE"):
+            self.assertTrue(is_junk_creditor_name(name), name)
+
+    def test_table_artifact_variants_are_rejected(self) -> None:
+        for name in ("[Table 35]", "[Table 12] Continued"):
+            self.assertTrue(is_junk_creditor_name(name), name)
+
+    def test_real_creditors_are_kept(self) -> None:
+        for name in ("CAPITAL ONE", "JPMCB CARD SERVICES", "BEST EGG"):
+            self.assertFalse(is_junk_creditor_name(name), name)
+
+
+class CreExtractionReportTests(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_hud_loan_amount_appears_as_report_card(self) -> None:
+        text = "Loan Amount: $800,000\nPurchase Price: $1,000,000\nCash to Close: $220,000"
+        cards = _report_cards(DocumentType.HUD_SETTLEMENT, text)
+        self.assertEqual(cards.get("Loan Amount"), 800_000.0)
+        self.assertEqual(cards.get("Purchase Price"), 1_000_000.0)
+
+    def test_below_minimum_loan_amount_is_not_reported(self) -> None:
+        """A tiny 'loan amount' figure is a mislabelled settlement line and must
+        never surface as the HUD loan amount card."""
+        text = "Loan Amount: $9,000\nPurchase Price: $50,000"
+        cards = _report_cards(DocumentType.HUD_SETTLEMENT, text)
+        self.assertNotIn("Loan Amount", cards)
+
+    def test_appraisal_as_is_value_appears_as_report_card(self) -> None:
+        text = "As-Is Value: $1,250,000\nMarket conditions stable."
+        cards = _report_cards(DocumentType.PROPERTY_APPRAISAL, text)
+        self.assertEqual(cards.get("Appraised / Sale Value"), 1_250_000.0)
+
+    def test_rent_roll_occupancy_ratio(self) -> None:
+        facts = extract_rent_roll_fields("Total Units: 50\nOccupied: 40")
+        self.assertEqual(facts.get("total_units"), 50)
+        self.assertAlmostEqual(float(facts.get("physical_occupancy", 0)), 0.8, places=3)
+
+    def test_t12_noi_derived_from_income_and_expenses(self) -> None:
+        text = "Effective Gross Income $500,000\nOperating Expenses $200,000"
+        facts = extract_t12_fields(text)
+        self.assertEqual(facts.get("noi"), 300_000.0)
+
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+    unittest.main()
